item.title: Tmux Setup
item.description: Why you use tmux ? How to install ? arch Configuration config

item.title: About
item.description: Whoami Software Engineer, seeking for learning new things everyday. Interested in : Backend Development Linux Open Source projects Find me on GitHub. Skills I also have some experience about: TypeScript Java Ruby Bash C/C++ Projects All The projects can be found Here, but here is a list of my top projects. Gimme Gimme is an application that helps users to reach unoffical stores and get their items by tusted users, from the people to the people.
